results.title: Aura: Security & Protection - Apps on Google Play
results.content:
Get comprehensive protection and security with Aura, your trusted solution against identity theft, fraud & online threats.  
  
Aura is an all-in-one digital safety & protection solution to help keep you safe from identity theft, financial fraud, online threats & data breaches. Protect your data, block online threats & stay ahead of fraud. Our award-winning technology¹ provides security & protection by monitoring & alerting if your identity, data, passwords, credit, or financial accounts are at risk.  
  
Download Aura today for digital identity protection, data security & peace of mind.  
  
► FAST FRAUD PROTECTION ALERTS  
Monitor identity & credit activity. Get fraud alerts on your mobile for security & protection to block scams and stop financial theft.  
  
► BROWSE ONLINE SAFELY [...] ► BROWSE ONLINE SAFELY  
Protect your identity, data from threats & enhance your digital security & online safety while shopping, banking & browsing with our easy-to-use VPN. Filter malware, phishing & scam sites with 100+ virtual locations. Block malicious sites & online threats that may steal your data.  
  
►PROTECT YOUR INFO FROM DATA BROKERS  
Data brokers sell your info, exposing you to spam & scams. Aura requests removal of your data from 200+ data brokers so you can take control of your privacy, security & protection.  
  
► GUARD YOUR FINANCES [...] Get insight into your child’s digital habits. Aura provides powerful parental controls—like content blocking, screen time limits & focus modes—plus safety alerts for emerging risks such as AI chat apps & insights into your child’s device use. Child safety & wellbeing features use a local VPN installed on a child's device to apply content blocking & time limits for their security, privacy & use Accessibility Service to securely capture text input data & identify apps where typing occurs.  
  
- Free trial: no charge, no commitment, cancel anytime  
- Payment charged to your Google Play account at confirmation of purchase  
- Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hrs before trial ends.

results.title: Medical Definition of Aura
results.content:
RxList Logo

# Definition of Aura

medical dictionary

Aura: A sensation perceived by a patient that precedes a condition affecting the brain. An aura often occurs before a migraine or seizure. It may consist of flashing lights, a gleam of light, blurred vision, an odor, the feeling of a breeze, numbness, weakness, or difficulty in speaking..

results.title: What Is An Aura? 16 FAQs About Seeing Auras, Colors, Layers, and More
results.content:
## 1. What exactly are auras?

People believe that auras are a luminous body that surrounds your physical one.

“As human beings, we radiate a very low level of electricity that’s otherwise known as an electromagnetic field,” says Christina Lonsdale, a Portland-based artist behind a popular aura photography practice called Radiant Human.

Ancient systems of medicine, such as Hindu scriptures (like the Vedas), believe that this energy is expressed in seven layers. Each layer is said to correlate to a different element of your physical, mental, spiritual, and emotional health.

## 2. What do the different aura colors mean?

General interpretations by shamans and practitioners suggest the following:

Aura Color Chart

## 3. Are auras real? [...] Aura Color Chart

## 3. Are auras real?

Though no scientific evidence exists to prove the existence of auras, many practices and philosophies believe that they are real. Though interpretations of what an aura actually is may vary across practices and philosophies.

One way to think of auras is as the energy that someone around you emits. Some people make you nervous; others relax you. This, in some ways, could be seen as a reaction to the energy a person radiates.

Proponents believe that auras reflect your state of being and that this energy is a manifestation of your spiritual and physical bodies.

## 4. Are auras the same thing as vibes?

Kind of!

“‘Vibes’ are short for ‘vibrational frequency,’ which is what an aura is comprised of,” Lonsdale says. [...] Your aura is said to change over time, so colors may come and go.

Each aura color has its own interpretation:

## 10. What does the color placement mean?

Each layer of your aura is said to correspond to a different chakra. Chakras are thought to be energy centers within your body.

Some layers or chakras may be more dominant. Others may be less visible and more difficult to sense.

Here’s a breakdown of the different layers and their colors:

## 11. What do the different layers mean?

General interpretations suggest the following:

## 12. Can your aura change over time?

Proponents believe it can!

“Everyone’s energy changes,” Lonsdale says. “It changes differently for everyone. There is no set formula.”

•2y ago

More like a slang for criminals

# People also ask about section

 People also ask about 

Meaning of aura in sports context

Define aura and its usage

Aura slang and its meanings

Good aura meaning and implications [...] Tricky-Armadillo2865

•2y ago

So the other answer is kind of right but not quite. I think most people use aura as how 'badass' someone is (its an ironic term sort of like how people say they're 'alpha' or 'sigma' despite not actually believing in those archetypes). I think it comes from Dragonball Z but I haven't watched it so I'm not sure. The other commenter said that you may say something has an 'aura of sadness' which is the traditional use of the word. Most younger people just say that something 'has aura'. This basically just means its badass or cool, and a lot of people use it in a very tongue-in-cheek manner, but some are actually serious about it (in the same manner that people may use 'alpha' ironically or seriously). It's a pretty new term so maybe it will evolve. [...] Image 10: u/00shiv00 avatar

Tricky-Armadillo2865

•2y ago

It's an arbitrary number and what you have to pay attention to is whether it's positive or negative and whether or not the number is incredibly large. It's like if someone lifted a lot of weight and you tell them they have 'level 500 strength' or something stupid. If someone got rejected after asking someone out, someone might say 'negative one million aura'. That isn't twice as bad as negative five hundred thousand, nor is it quantifiable in any capacity, it's just another way of saying 'this guy has terrible social skills' using slang.

results.content:
### 

The ongoing support has been nothing short of excellent – friendly and approachable, but with a high level of technical knowledge.

If any issues are encountered, Aura ensures that users return to work quickly. Over a year, this improves efficiency, productivity, and ultimately, less stress for all our employees.

### 

Aura has updated operating systems, software, and applications to give better support and ensure the new systems are easier to maintain.

Aura has helped us feel like we have a more robust system in place, and it helped free up time elsewhere. More importantly, Aura feels like part of our team

### [...] ### 

Aura are now looking after all our IT requirements. It’s a night and day difference to what we used to have. The team are extremely responsive, and nothing seems to be a problem.

I actually feel that they are truly working with us — not just providing a utility. They understand how we work and might work better. I feel it’s a collaboration — not just IT support.
